The '''''Aggressor''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==History==
Early in [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ''Aggressor'' transported the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] agent [[Mar Barezz]].<ref name="RR" />

Following the death of [[Gil Bastra]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6.5 ABY]], it transported [[Kirtan Loor]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="X-wRS" /><ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The novel ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' describes Loor as being onboard a shuttle attached to the SSD [[Aggressor (Executor-class)|''Aggressor'']]. This is an error, seeing as this ''Aggressor'' had already been destroyed at that point. ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' from 2008 describes Loor as using the ISD ''Aggressor'', with no reference linking him to a SSD.

{{Ship-stub}}
